mapper.select: SELECT m.member_id, m.member_name FROM member m JOIN class_record cr ON m.member_id = cr.member_id WHERE cr.class_id = 1
SELECT m.member_id, m.member_name FROM member m JOIN class_record cr ON m.member_id = cr.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id WHERE ct.class_name = '增肌'
SELECT m.member_id, m.member_name FROM member m WHERE m.member_id NOT IN ( SELECT cr.member_id FROM class_record cr WHERE cr.class_id = 1 )

SELECT m.member_name FROM member m WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ct.class_id FROM class_table ct WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT cr.record_id FROM class_record cr WHERE cr.member_id = m.member_id AND cr.class_id = ct.class_id ) )

SELECT cr.member_id, ROUND(AVG(cr.rating), 1) AS avg_rating FROM class_record cr WHERE cr.rating IS NOT NULL AND cr.class_id <> 1 AND cr.member_id NOT IN ( SELECT cr2.member_id FROM class_record cr2 WHERE cr2.class_id <> 1 AND cr2.rating IS NOT NULL AND cr2.rating < 5.0 ) GROUP BY cr.member_id ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

SELECT m.member_name, cr.rating FROM member m JOIN class_record cr ON m.member_id = cr.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id WHERE ct.class_name = '增肌' AND cr.rating IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cr.rating DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1

SELECT m.member_name FROM member m JOIN class_record cr ON m.member_id = cr.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id WHERE ct.class_level = 3 AND cr.rating >= 8.0 GROUP BY m.member_id, m.member_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cr.class_id) >= 3

SELECT member_id, COUNT(DISTINCT class_id) AS course_count FROM class_record GROUP BY member_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT class_id) IN ( SELECT cnt FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT class_id) AS cnt FROM class_record GROUP BY member_id ) t GROUP BY cnt HAVING COUNT(*) = 1 )
SELECT * FROM member WHERE member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT * FROM class_record WHERE rating BETWEEN #{low} AND #{high}

SELECT DISTINCT m.member_name FROM member m JOIN class_record cr ON m.member_id = cr.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id WHERE ct.class_name IN
#{name}
SELECT * FROM class_record WHERE rating IS NULL AND status = 0
SELECT DISTINCT ct.class_name FROM class_table ct JOIN class_record cr ON ct.class_id = cr.class_id

SELECT m.member_name, ct.class_name, cr.rating FROM class_record cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id WHERE cr.rating IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cr.rating DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ct.class_name, ROUND(AVG(cr.rating), 1) AS avg_rating FROM class_table ct JOIN class_record cr ON ct.class_id = cr.class_id WHERE cr.rating IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ct.class_id, ct.class_name HAVING AVG(cr.rating) >= #{minAvg}
